commit.message:
feat: calculadora CER con modo Precio→TIR y TIR→Precio

- Detecta bonos CER (LECER/BONCER) por tipo y activa modo específico
- Fórmula correcta: TIR = (VF/precio)^(365/dtm) − 1 (act/365 compound)
- VF derivado del TIR actual del backend (era precio×1.05, incorrecto)
- Toggle: "Precio → TIR/TNA" muestra tasas reales; "TIR → Precio" muestra precio implícito
- Modo estándar (LECAP/BONCAP) sin cambios

Co-Authored-By: Claude Sonnet 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

Fix data leakage in encoding and improve logistic regression

- Refactor encode_features to return raw categoricals; add apply_dummies
  to one-hot encode train/test splits separately, preventing test-set
  category leakage into the feature space
- Update logistic regression to use balanced class weights, saga solver
  with pure L1 penalty, more iterations, and balanced_accuracy scoring
- Minor README clarifications on research question and preprocessing note

commit.message:
fix: use mipsle (little-endian) instead of mips for Keenetic routers

Keenetic routers use MIPS little-endian processors, not big-endian.
The installer was downloading the wrong binary architecture.

Changes:
- GOARCH=mips -> GOARCH=mipsle in Makefile and workflows
- Binary renamed: xkeen-ui-keenetic-mips -> xkeen-ui-keenetic-mipsle
- setup.sh now correctly detects and returns "mipsle" for MIPS devices
- arch.go updated to return correct binary name

commit.message:
feat(attestation): implement get_difficulty_assessment with DifficultyPath link index

assess_difficulty now links the created DifficultyAssessment entry directly from
request_ref (ExternalHash) using a new DifficultyPath link type, consistent with
how governance indexes badges via StudyToBadge. No path intermediate needed since
request_ref is already a valid DHT base address.

get_difficulty_assessment replaces the stub with a real get_links query on
DifficultyPath, returning the most recently linked record (links.last(), matching
get_current_phase behaviour) or None if no assessment exists.

Test 5.3 updated: single scenario verifies before/after assess_difficulty, decodes
the returned entry to check request_ref bytes and code_volume, and confirms a
different unassessed request_ref still returns null. Combines two cases in one
conductor to avoid resource exhaustion between back-to-back test runs.

tests/README.md: 54 → 55 pass; get_difficulty_assessment moved to resolved table.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Sonnet 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

commit.message:
chore(beads): ignore br runtime directories in .beads/.gitignore

The br (beads_rust) tool creates two runtime directories inside .beads/:

  .br_history/   — stores command history for interactive br sessions,
                   analogous to shell history files; machine-specific and
                   session-ephemeral
  .br_recovery/  — stores crash recovery state; only relevant while a br
                   command is actively running; should never be committed

These are generated at runtime and vary per machine and session. Committing
them would create noisy, meaningless diffs and pollute the shared history
with local artefacts that have no value to other contributors.

Added to .beads/.gitignore alongside the existing exclusions for SQLite
database files, lock files, and last-touched timestamps.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Sonnet 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>

Fix entity definitions against reference, correct climate modes, and harden protocol layer

Entity definitions cross-checked against Beormund/esphome-samsung-nasa reference:
- Fix NASA mode values (Auto=0, Cool=1, Dry=2, Fan=3, Heat=4)
- Fix 0x4426 (now indoor_generated_power, W) and add 0x4427 (indoor_cumulative_energy, kWh)
- Remove wrong divisor/signed from 0x4284, 0x8238; fix accuracy on 0x8413
- Fix number ranges, add missing divisor/signed on temp FSVs, add device_class duration
- Fix select option labels and order; move 0x409B from select to switch
- Fix text sensor mappings for 0x8000, 0x8001; expand 0x8235 error codes
- Add device_class heat to booster_heater binary sensor

Protocol and reliability fixes:
- Always use int16_t for signed values (matches Samsung NASA convention)
- Fix Variable decode signed left-shift UB
- Skip packet_number 0 (fire-and-forget sentinel collision)
- Fix millis() wraparound in timeout, retry, and FSV startup delay checks
- Fix include path to use __file__ (works with GitHub external_components)
- Add duplicate device address validation
- Clear custom/standard fan mode properly on climate mode switch
- Remove unused dest param from send_read, dead code from nasa.py
- Reserve rx_buffer_, log queue drops, use LONG_MIN sentinel

Fix workflow artifact passing between collect and report jobs

The generate-report workflow failed because it tried to download an
artifact named intel-db-{current_run_number}, which never exists since
the collect workflow uploaded with a different run number. Fixed by:

- Using a fixed artifact name "intel-db" with overwrite:true
- Switching to dawidd6/action-download-artifact@v6 for cross-workflow
  artifact downloads
- Adding previous DB download to collect workflow for data continuity
- Adding report type auto-detection from cron schedule
- Adding error handling in report generation
- Fixing requirements.txt path (was backend/requirements.txt)

commit.message:
Split brow into independent L/R brow position sliders

Replaces the single Brow X/Y with separate L Brow X/Y and R Brow X/Y
sliders so each eyebrow can be positioned independently. Both renderers
now split the brow line at the midpoint, applying left offsets to chars
in the first half and right offsets to the second half.

commit.message:
feat: tiered age gate, profit ladder gas floor, TDZ confirmation

Age gate (mandate.js + prompts.js):
- Hard block now < 15min (was < 30min)
- New 15–30min HOT WINDOW: allowed if vol1h ≥ $50K AND buy ratio ≥ 70%
  AND mcap > $50K — catches breakouts like LOBSTER +1638% that were
  previously killed by the 30min hard rule
- launchQuality() gains [HOT] tag and mcapFloor check; passes now includes
  meetsMcap; system prompt table updated to match

Profit ladder gas floor (trailing-stops.js):
- scanProfitLadder now skips any rung where amountUsd < $3 (gas minimum)
- On a $5 position rung 1 (33% = $1.65) and rung 2 (33% of remainder)
  both skip until position grows enough to clear $3 per rung
- Prevents the common "Trade too small: $X below $3 minimum" wasted cycles

TDZ: stop-loss bypass path was already fixed (let execution = null before
try block). Trailing stop and profit ladder bypass paths at lines 288/333
are not TDZ — const is declared and returned within the same block scope.

commit.message:
Fix login rejecting users with NULL is_active

The loginUser() query filtered with AND is_active = 1, which silently
rejected any user whose is_active column was NULL. Now matches the
API auth fix: fetch the user first, then only block if is_active is
explicitly 0.

commit.message:
feat: Phase 4 — clip extraction engine

FFmpeg-based clip extraction with NVENC GPU acceleration:
- extract_clip(): NVENC first, auto-retry with libx264 on failure
- silence_remover: silencedetect + concat demuxer splice
- batch_clipper: enqueue pending clips as huey_light tasks
- Full /api/clips router (CRUD, download, thumbnail, batch extract)
- extract_clip_task + batch_extract_task on huey_light
- analysis_task now actually enqueues extraction for auto-created clips

Path convention: media/clips/{item_id}/{clip_id}.mp4

Phase 3: Music+SFX coexistence via SFX_LEFT/SFX_RIGHT channel guards

MUSIC_UPDATE now checks SFX_LEFT before writing to channel 0, and
SFX_RIGHT before writing to channel 1. If SFX owns a channel, music
skips it entirely and resumes automatically once the SFX finishes.
No changes needed to SoundEngine — it already manages channel claims.

commit.message:
Fix annual membership billing to charge on anniversary date

This commit implements comprehensive fixes for annual membership billing
to ensure members are charged the correct amount on their subscription
anniversary date, not monthly.

Core Changes:
- Added addYears() helper function to calculate annual renewal dates
- Annual memberships now renew exactly 1 year from signup date
- Additional member fees for annual plans: $25/month × 12 = $300/year
- Pro-rating for mid-year member additions to annual accounts

Files Modified:

1. src/lib/billing.ts
   - Added addYears() utility function

2. src/pages/api/subscriptions/create.ts
   - Calculate additional member fees based on plan interval
   - Annual plans: multiply fee by 12 for full year amount
   - Set next_billing_date to +1 year for annual plans

3. src/pages/api/payment/confirm.ts
   - Same fixes for member onboarding flow
   - Properly calculate annual dues with additional members

4. src/pages/api/cron/monthly-billing.ts
   - Join with subscription_plans to get billing interval
   - Set next renewal date based on interval (month or year)

5. src/pages/api/cron/retry-failed-payments.ts
   - Respect billing interval when recovering from failed payments

6. src/pages/api/members/add-to-account.ts
   - Pro-rate additional member fees for annual plans
   - Calculate months remaining until renewal
   - Charge immediately: $25 × months remaining
   - Update monthly_dues to include full $300/year for next renewal

7. src/components/MemberSubscriptionCard.tsx
   - Removed Stripe subscription logic (app-managed only)
   - Display "Total ARR" for annual plans (not "Total MRR")
   - Show /yr suffix for annual plans
   - Calculate base membership by subtracting additional member fees
   - Fix "PAUSED" status display for non-Stripe subscriptions

8. scripts/fix-existing-annual-members.ts
   - Script to fix existing annual members with incorrect data
   - Updated 2 accounts with correct plan assignment and renewal dates

Impact:
- Member b6a422e0: Updated to Annual plan, $1500/yr, renewal 2026-05-31
- Member 75df2103: Fixed renewal date to 2027-03-10 (anniversary)

commit.message:
fix(stdin): 非TTY並列権限確認の競合とstdinバッファ消失バグを修正

## バグ修正
- `ExitPromptError`: 非TTYでstdinが閉じるとinquirerがクラッシュする問題
- 並列ツール実行時に10個のinquirerが同時にstdinを奪い合う競合問題
- `readline.createInterface`を毎回作成することによるstdin内部バッファ消失

## 実装
- `src/utils/non-tty-reader.ts`: NonTTYReaderシングルトン追加
  - readlineを1インスタンスのみ作成・共有 (lineQueue + waiters パターン)
- `src/cli/interactive-input.ts`: fallbackQuestion を NonTTYReader に移行
- `src/security/permission-manager.ts`:
  - `_permissionQueue` による権限確認の直列化 (promise chain queue)
  - 非TTY時はテキストメニュー(1-5)で NonTTYReader から入力
  - TTY時は inquirer + ExitPromptError キャッチ

## スキル追加
- `.localllm/skills/lllmagents-test/SKILL.md`: 動作テスト手順スキル
  - パイプ入力でのテスト方法、権限確認の注意点、不具合修正後のワークフロー

## ドキュメント
- `docs/internal_design.md`: Section 10 として非TTY対応設計を追記

Co-Authored-By: Claude Sonnet 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

Add comprehensive Invoice documentation for AI chatbot

**What was added:**
- 1,000+ line comprehensive "How to Create & Manage Invoices" guide
- Covers ALL invoice aspects: Draft, Sent, Partial, Paid, Overdue statuses
- Complete invoice creation workflow with Nigerian business examples
- Payment recording and confirmation process explained
- 12 detailed sections covering every feature
- 3 real Nigerian B2B business examples (Construction, Fashion, Food)
- 100+ keywords for RAG search optimization

**Test Results:**
✅ 10/10 queries successfully retrieved documentation (100% success rate)
- "how do i create a new invoice" - Score: 3280
- "how to record a payment for an invoice" - Score: 3640
- "how to send invoice to customer via whatsapp" - Score: 1780

All queries covering create invoice, draft/sent/partial/paid/overdue statuses,
recording payments, and confirming payments work perfectly.
